subcodes.title: Ziyarat-Namiy-i-Um al-Uliya Madar-i-Aqa Muh. Karim 'Attar
subcodes.first_line: The resplendent mention shining forth from the horizon of the Kingdom and the radiant light beaming from the firmament of might be upon thee, O My handmaiden [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الذکر اللائح من افق الملکوت و النور الساطع من افق سماء الجبروت علیک یا امتی
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @soul; spirit after death
